# Linagliptin 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Linagliptin 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Linagliptin</strong> 目前有 <strong>6 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Linagliptin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Trajenta is indicated in the treatment of type 2 diabetes mellitus to improve glycaemic control in adults: as monotherapy  in patients inadequately controlled by diet and exercise alone and for whom...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>opsismodysplasia（94.9%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（94.5%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（94.2%）</li>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（94.2%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（94.1%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（91.8%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（91.5%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（91.2%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（91.2%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（90.8%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（90.0%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（82.8%）</li>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（79.8%）</li>
<li>atrial flutter (disease)（67.3%）</li>
<li>congenital temporomandibular joint ankylosis（63.2%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（62.8%）</li>
<li>hypercarotenemia and vitamin A deficiency, autosomal recessive（61.8%）</li>
<li>mitral valve prolapse, myxomatous（60.8%）</li>
<li>hemoglobin C-beta-thalassemia syndrome（60.4%）</li>
<li>polydipsia（59.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/linagliptin/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
